title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

items.title: Majority of Americans disapprove of how Trump handling tariffs: ABC/Post/Ipsos poll
items.description: The poll was conducted just days before a SCOTUS decision invalidating tariffs.

items.title: WATCH:  President Trump addresses the media after SCOTUS tariff decision
items.description: A Friday SCOTUS decision invalidated most of President Trump's global tariffs, a cornerstone of his economic policy in his second term.

items.title: Trump attacks Supreme Court over tariff ruling, announces new 10% global tariff
items.description: President Trump lashed out at the Supreme Court over its tariff decision, saying he was "absolutely ashamed" of the justices who ruled against him.

items.title: Supreme Court ruling against Trump tariffs will offer relief, businesses say

items.title: Trump admin. unveils plans to restrict work permits for asylum-seekers
items.description: The Trump administration on Friday formally proposed a regulation that would dramatically restrict work permits for asylum-seekers.

items.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump’s sweeping tariffs, upending central plank of his economic agenda
items.description: President Donald Trump says he’s imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.
